title: 49 St. Mary's River Drive
address: 49 St. Mary's River Drive, Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario P6A 6G9
headline: 102-Unit Investment Opportunity in Sault Ste. Marie
description: Station 49 Apartments is a 102-suite, purpose-built multifamily asset located at 49 St. Mary's River Drive in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario. Offered at $11,640,000 (just $114,117 per unit), this investment presents a compelling opportunity to acquire scale in a stable Northern Ontario rental market with significant embedded upside.
fullDescription:
The property features a highly efficient unit mix, with 101 one-bedroom suites and 1 two-bedroom suite. It is professionally managed with steady turnover that supports rental growth. The asset generates additional revenue through laundry, parking, and air conditioning rentals, and has implemented cost-saving systems such as individual heating cost controls.

With approximately 60% upside to market rents, robust historical turnover averaging 16.9% annually over the last three years, and recent capital improvements, Station 49 Apartments is well-positioned to deliver strong cash flow and long-term value growth for an active investor.
features: Significant rental upside (approx 60%)
Favourable turnover trends (average 16.9% over the last 3 years)
Attractive price per unit — only $114,117 per unit
Supplementary revenue streams through laundry and parking income
Recent capital improvements — brand new hot water tanks, exterior renovation and more
In-suite energy controls installed to improve energy efficiency

title: 75 Emma Street
headline: 21-Unit Modern Multifamily Asset Located in Central Oshawa
description: 75 Emma Street presents an opportunity to acquire a modern, multifamily asset distinguished by an exceptionally large-suite, family-oriented unit mix in a central Oshawa location.
fullDescription: The five-storey building was constructed in 2016 and comprises 21 residential units, the majority of which are three-bedroom suites — a rare offering in today's rental market. These family-sized units are complemented by oversized floorplans, with an average unit size of approximately 1,200 square feet and select suites measuring up to 1,486 square feet, significantly exceeding typical market norms.
features: Strong income profile with estimated Year 1 NOI of $417,817
Highly desirable suite mix with predominantly three-bedroom units
Exceptional unit sizes with an average of 1,200 SF, with some up to 1,486 SF
Modern, low-capex asset built in 2016
Central Oshawa location close to public transit and downtown amenities

title: 1165 Kingston Road
headline: Multifamily Investment For Sale Located In The Beaches
description: Introducing a well-maintained, income-producing multifamily investment in The Beaches. 1165 Kingston Road features 21 large one-bedroom units averaging 600–700 sq. ft., each offering generous layouts with separate living and dining spaces, decorative fireplaces, and abundant character.
fullDescription:
The property generates stable rental income, supplemented by parking stall fees and laundry revenue. Recent upgrades include most unit doors (2020–2022), hallway improvements, and ongoing suite renovations. Major building systems have been well cared for, with a roof replacement in 2009 and a boiler upgrade in 2017.

Set on a 0.3-acre lot in a highly desirable stretch of Kingston Road, this asset benefits from strong tenant demand, nearby retail and dining, and excellent public transit connectivity to both the Danforth subway and Queen Street streetcar.
features: Large, character-rich units that stand out in the market (600–700 sq. ft.)
Multiple revenue streams beyond base rent (laundry & parking)
Many capital improvements made (newer boiler — 2017, new entry doors — 2020–2022)
Prime Toronto location with exceptional connectivity

title: 17–19 Collier Street
address: 17-19 Collier Street, St. Catharines, Ontario L2P 2T1
headline: Beautifully Renovated 32-Unit Multifamily in St. Catharines
description: Presenting 17–19 Collier Street, a beautifully renovated 32-unit multifamily property in the heart of St. Catharines, Ontario. This 1.09-acre, four-storey building combines modern amenities with an ideal location, making it an excellent investment opportunity.
fullDescription:
Built in 1951 and fully updated in 2022–2023, the property offers a balanced suite mix of 15 one-bedroom and 17 two-bedroom units, each designed with contemporary comforts and quality finishes.

Each unit features an open-concept living space with a modern kitchen equipped with quartz-style countertops, a stylish tile backsplash, and a spacious island ideal for dining. Brand-new flooring runs throughout, and bathrooms have been updated to include full-sized baths with tiled surrounds. Tenants enjoy personalized comfort with individual heat controls and energy-efficient windows, while on-site laundry facilities add convenience and generate supplemental income.
features: Strong projected Year 1 NOI of $481,606
Renovated units featuring open-concept layouts, quartz-style kitchen countertops and new flooring
Hydro individually metered, with costs fully covered by tenants; electric heating
On-site laundry generates supplemental income
6 rentable storage lockers available for extra income

title: 133–143 Main Street
headline: Vacant 55-Unit Retirement Building — 1.40 Acre Main Street Assemblage
description: On behalf of TDB Restructuring Limited in its capacity as Court-Appointed Receiver, Colliers is pleased to offer for sale 133–143 Main Street — a 1.40-acre Main Street assemblage with approximately 350 ft of frontage, currently improved with a 3-storey, vacant 55-suite retirement residence and three adjacent single-family lots.
fullDescription:
The Retirement Residence totals 36,156 SF of GFA, with potential to add another 29,844 SF of gross floor area and bring total unit count to 108 units.

The property was previously licensed under the Retirement Homes Regulatory Authority (RHRA), supporting its former use as a specialized supportive housing facility. Under its prior license, the home was approved to offer a full spectrum of care services, including memory care, assisted living, independent living with support services, special needs and complex care, palliative care, and respite or short-term stays.

The company is available for acquisition alongside the property, offering the potential to utilize existing operating tax losses to create significant tax savings for purchasers.

Situated approximately 20 km north of London (Masonville Mall) on Highway 4, the site anchors the walkable core of Lucan and is steps away from community amenities.
features: Vacant 55-suite retirement residence with 36,156 SF GFA
Potential to expand to 108 units with additional 29,844 SF
1.40-acre assemblage with ~350 ft of Main Street frontage
Previously RHRA-licensed for full spectrum of care services
Company available for acquisition — operating tax losses for significant tax savings
Receiver sale — court-appointed process
